title: Remove Heap Analytics Code from DataTools Pro
story: As a product administrator, I want redundant Heap analytics code removed from the application since we have switched to Pendo.io, so that unnecessary libraries are not loaded.
description: Remove Heap analytics JavaScript code from app.datatoolspro.com. The product has migrated to Pendo.io for product analytics, making Heap redundant. Removing it reduces page load overhead and simplifies the analytics stack.
acceptance_criteria: Heap analytics code is removed from all pages
Pendo.io continues to function as the primary analytics tool
No regression in page load performance
implementation_notes: Straightforward removal of Heap JS snippet from the application.
comment_summary: Developer removed Heap code on development.
